ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Official email address of the institution */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the universities table */,
  "wranking" INTEGER /* World ranking of the institution */,
  "nranking" INTEGER /* National ranking of the institution */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the ranking is recorded */,
  "ranking_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking (e.g., QS, THE, US News) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role for which the permission is granted */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view rankings, edit rankings, view user data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., financial, academic performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the universities table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data sources table */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the additional data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the university rankings table */,
  "previous_wranking" INTEGER /* Previous world ranking */,
  "previous_nranking" INTEGER /* Previous national ranking */,
  "new_wranking" INTEGER /* New world ranking */,
  "new_nranking" INTEGER /* New national ranking */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the database */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
